# Website Vikreta
> Website Vikreta is an AI-first web agency based in Pune, India. We design and build fast, modern websites and intelligent AI automation systems for businesses ready to grow. Our work sits at the intersection of design, engineering, and artificial intelligence.

## About

Website Vikreta is a Pune-based digital agency focused on bringing AI-first thinking to web design and business automation. We work with startups, small businesses, and growing companies across India who want a web presence that does more than look good — one that works intelligently.

We believe every business deserves a website that is fast, accessible, and built for the future. We also believe that repetitive business processes should be automated so teams can focus on work that actually matters.

## Services

### Web Development
We build modern, performant websites using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Every site is optimised for speed, SEO, and mobile — designed to convert visitors into clients.

### AI Automations
We design and build custom AI automation systems that connect your tools, eliminate repetitive work, and let your team focus on high-value tasks. From lead capture to client delivery — fully automated workflows built around your business.

### UI/UX Design
We design intuitive, conversion-focused user interfaces and experiences for web and mobile products. Clean, modern design that puts the user first.

### Web and Mobile Apps
Custom web and mobile application development built with modern frameworks. Fast, scalable apps for startups and growing businesses across India.

### Digital Marketing
Strategic digital marketing services — SEO, content, and growth campaigns built for businesses ready to expand their online presence across India.

## Location and Contact

- Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India
- Website: https://stage.websitevikreta.com
- Contact page: https://stage.websitevikreta.com/contact
- Email: contact@websitevikreta.com
- Phone: +919970445198

## Technology

We build with modern, production-grade tools:
- Framework: Next.js (App Router) with TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4
- Animation: Framer Motion
- CMS: Sanity (for content-managed sites)
- Deployment: Vercel
- AI integrations: custom-built using leading AI APIs

## Audience

Website Vikreta works with:
- Startups and early-stage companies needing their first professional website
- Small and medium businesses looking to modernise their web presence
- Founders and teams who want to automate repetitive business workflows
- Companies across India seeking an AI-aware digital agency partner

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://stage.websitevikreta.com): Brand overview, services summary, featured work, and contact entry point
- [Web Development](https://stage.websitevikreta.com/services/web-development): Next.js websites built for speed, SEO, and mobile
- [AI Automations](https://stage.websitevikreta.com/services/ai-automations): Custom AI automation systems for business workflows
- [UI/UX Design](https://stage.websitevikreta.com/services/uiux-design): User interface and experience design for web and mobile
- [Web and Mobile Apps](https://stage.websitevikreta.com/services/web-and-mobile-apps): Custom application development for startups and businesses
- [Digital Marketing](https://stage.websitevikreta.com/services/digital-marketing): SEO, content, and digital growth services
- [Our Work](https://stage.websitevikreta.com/work): Projects and case studies
- [Blog](https://stage.websitevikreta.com/blog): Articles on web design, AI automation, and digital growth
- [FAQ](https://stage.websitevikreta.com/faq): Common questions about our services, process, and pricing
- [Contact](https://stage.websitevikreta.com/contact): Get in touch and start a project

## What We Are Not

- We are not a freelancer marketplace
- We are not a template-based website builder
- We are not a large agency with hundreds of staff
- We are a focused, specialist team that builds custom digital products with AI at the core
